title: Nous sommes venus
overview: “I was 7 years old when I crossed the border on January 23, 1965, into Hendaye. I have no memory of arriving in France. How can one give an account of an event of which one has no memory, if not by seeking one’s story in that of others?” José Vieira

trailers.title: 19º Doclisboa | Competição Portuguesa | We came | José Vieira
